hooks.name: prevent-database-drop
hooks.condition: command contains 'DROP DATABASE' or 'DROP SCHEMA' or 'dropdb'
hooks.message: ⚠️ Destructive database operation detected. This will permanently delete data. Are you sure?

hooks.name: prevent-force-push
hooks.message: ⚠️ Force push detected. This will rewrite remote history. Are you sure?

hooks.name: prevent-secret-exposure
hooks.condition: content contains real API keys, passwords, or secrets
hooks.message: ⚠️ Potential secret detected in file content. Use environment variables instead.
